name: @hiperplano/aluy-cli
description: Aluy CLI — TUI (Ink) + binário `aluy` + wiring. Consome @hiperplano/aluy-cli-core (engine portável). Credenciais só no keychain do SO.

scripts.scan-bundle: node scripts/bundle.mjs && node -e "import('./scripts/scan-bundle.mjs').then(async m=>{const fs=await import('node:fs');const h=[...m.scanForSecrets(fs.readFileSync('dist-bundle/bin/aluy.js','utf8')),...m.scanForSecrets(fs.readFileSync('dist-bundle/index.js','utf8'))];if(h.length){console.error('SEGREDO no bundle:',h);process.exit(1)}console.log('bundle limpo')})"
